firstStart.title: Welcome — how do you want to start?
firstStart.description: Lead a deployment, join as helper with handoff, or use privately. Same app — you can switch later in settings.
firstStart.bossTitle: Deployment lead — I'm starting the operation
firstStart.bossSubtitle: No wallet or package yet — step-by-step setup.
firstStart.bossDetail: Wallet, Move package, mailboxes, then provision helpers via handoff.
firstStart.einsatzSubtitle: Team, mailbox and full node come from the ZIP.
firstStart.einsatzDetail: Then enter seed via QR or mnemonic — no PC server required.
firstStart.soloSubtitle: Set up your wallet yourself, like on desktop.
firstStart.soloDetail: Import seed, create new, or unlock with app password. Network & mailbox come next.
firstStart.tipEmptyBasisUrl: Tip: leave API base URL empty for standalone without Morgendrot server.

handoff.step1Description: Import ZIP — package, mailbox and full node are applied automatically. Then enter your mnemonic.
handoff.step2DescriptionEinsatz: Already configured from handoff — scan seed QR or enter mnemonic (from boss).
handoff.step2DescriptionSolo: Private mode: import seed, create new, or unlock with saved app password — like on desktop.

hints.firstStartChoice: First launch: choose deployment (handoff) or private/solo — then set up wallet like on desktop.
hints.einsatzAwaitHandoff: Deployment mode: import handoff ZIP — then seed from boss. No PC server (empty API base URL).
hints.soloActive: Private/solo active — unlock wallet, then network & mailbox in the solo wizard on the dashboard.
hints.soloWalletSetup: Private/solo: set up wallet (seed). Then network & mailbox in the solo wizard — no boss needed.
hints.handoffOkNeedSeed: Handoff OK — set up seed (QR from boss), then chat under Messages.
hints.standaloneActive: Standalone APK active — direct RPC, no Morgendrot server required.
hints.missingFullnode: Standalone APK: full node URL missing — check handoff again.

offline.awaitHandoffSteps: Handoff active — step 2: enter mnemonic (seed from boss). Package, mailbox and full node are already configured.

readiness.setupChain: Enter full node, package ID and mailbox ID (solo wizard)

soloWizard.title: Step 3: Network & mailbox
soloWizard.description: Full node (testnet), package ID and mailbox ID — then chat is ready. Saving also stores a mainnet lab profile (switch under Settings → Network).
soloWizard.savedOk: Saved — you can open Messages now.

errors.invalidRpc: Invalid full node URL — expected https://…
errors.missingSigner: Wallet address missing — unlock wallet first.
